I_LI-7200	mean_value_LI-7500	u_var	v_var	w_var	ts_var	co2_var	h2o_var	ch4_var	none_var	w/ts_cov	w/co2_cov	w/h2o_cov	w/ch4_cov	w/none_cov	co2_mean	h2o_mean	avg_signal_strength_7200_mean	co2_signal_strength_7200_mean	h2o_signal_strength_7200_mean	delta_signal_strength_7200_mean	flowrate_mean	rssi_77_mean	CHK
